Class SimpleTilesListener

java.lang.Object
org.apache.tiles.web.startup.AbstractTilesListener
org.apache.tiles.web.startup.simple.SimpleTilesListener
All Implemented Interfaces:
EventListener, javax.servlet.ServletContextListener
public class SimpleTilesListener extends AbstractTilesListener
A Tiles listener that loads Tiles in the default way.
Since:
2.2.0
Version:
